ideation: This sequence aims to capture the uncertainty and questioning implied by the white question mark emoji. The robot will tilt its head slightly, and its arms will move in a questioning, slightly hesitant manner.  The animation will start with arms relaxed, then move to a pose suggesting thought, and finally settle into a posture that reflects uncertainty.  I'll maintain a slight asymmetry to avoid a robotic look. I will consult the examples to ensure the range of motion is natural for the robot.

frames.beat: arms hang relaxed, a moment of quiet contemplation
arms lift slightly, questioning, a slight tilt
a hesitant gesture, uncertainty hangs in the air
